## Portfolio Submission

### Designer Information
- **Name:** [Your Full Name]
- **Discipline:** [Architecture / UX/UI / Product Design / Interior Design / Graphic Design]
- **Location:** [City, Country]
- **Portfolio Website:** [https://your-website.com]
- **Email:** [your.email@example.com]

### Portfolio Description
[Describe your design work, expertise, and what makes your portfolio unique]

### Key Projects (minimum 3)
#### Project 1: [Project Name]
- **Discipline:** [Architecture/UX/Product/Interior/Graphic]
- **Description:** [Brief description]
- **Tools Used:** [Figma, AutoCAD, Sketch, etc.]
- **Year:** [Completion year]
- **Link:** [Project URL if available]

#### Project 2: [Project Name]
- **Discipline:** [Design discipline]
- **Description:** [Brief description]
- **Tools Used:** [Design tools]
- **Year:** [Completion year]
- **Link:** [Project URL if available]

#### Project 3: [Project Name]
- **Discipline:** [Design discipline]
- **Description:** [Brief description]
- **Tools Used:** [Design tools]
- **Year:** [Completion year]
- **Link:** [Project URL if available]

### Design Philosophy
[Your approach to design, influences, and core principles]

### Social Profiles
- LinkedIn: [URL]
- Behance: [URL]
- Dribbble: [URL]
- Other: [URL]

### Declaration
- [ ] I confirm this is my own original design work
- [ ] I have permission to showcase these projects
- [ ] All images are properly licensed for public display
- [ ] I agree to the community guidelines
